PaginatedTableService.columns: id, slug, title, description, created_at, updated_at, username, bio, image, favorites_count, tags
PaginatedTableService.sql: select a.id as id, a.slug as slug, a.title as title, a.description as description, cast(a.created_at as varchar) as created_at, cast(a.updated_at as varchar) as updated_at, u.username as username, u.bio as bio, u.image as image, (select count(*) from favorites f where f.article_id = a.id) as favorites_count, coalesce(( select listagg(t.name, ',') within group (order by t.name) from article_tags at join tags t on t.id = at.tag_id where at.article_id = a.id ), '') as tags from articles a join users u on u.id = a.author_id
